mechanism_explained: Felt cost before framework: observation primes the need for the discipline.
Consolidation requires struggle; AI-assisted practice removes the struggle and therefore the consolidation.
Pattern recognition is Claude's strength; supervisory judgment is currently irreducibly human.
Technical fluency without domain depth is the specific danger zone — counter-productivity at the institutional level.
Specifications + handoff conditions = explicit interface between human intent and Claude execution.
PA, PF, TO, IJ, EI — the five things the model cannot supply because its own weights produced the output.
Tooling makes the discipline operational: phase gates institutionalize the cognitive work the human must do first.
Decisions written down once cannot be silently swapped under deadline pressure; the SDD is the immutable record.
Five-element specification format makes the human's task definition machine-actionable.
Plausible-but-wrong output passes surface checks; only domain-grounded testable conditions catch the dangerous middle.
Three-file constitution separates aesthetic intent (human) from technical execution (Claude); refusal is the safety mechanism.
/v0 gate forces problem formulation before any prompt is written; the Boondoggle Score sequences the rest.
PDCA at student scale: every step has a handoff condition; /rewind not forward-correction; /clear when context is polluted.
Three-pass verification against SDD needs (not just tests); the post-build document is the proof of capability.
Learning is transformation of the learner through purposeful experience; the post-build document records that transformation.
